description: Phase 2 sub-phase 2.3: ship walk-ancestors — library parent-direction closure-table traversal + pi tool + scripts/orchestrator/walk-ancestors.ts. Mirrors walkDescendants (project-context.ts:325) inverted. FGAP-029 partial closure.
acceptance_criteria: walkAncestors(itemId, relationType, edges) library function exported from project-context.ts; signature: (itemId: string, relationType: string, edges: Edge[]) => string[]; visited-set cycle protection; iterates edges.filter(e => e.child === id) recursing on e.parent
walkAncestorsByLens(cwd, itemId, relationType) wrapper exported from lens-view.ts mirroring walkLensDescendants pattern
walk-ancestors pi tool registered in packages/pi-context/src/index.ts with Type.Object({itemId, relationType})

Tests cover: linear DAG ancestor chain / branching DAG / cycle protection / no-ancestors / relation_type filter; per-test fixtures create mkdtempSync + writeBootstrapPointer + .project/relations.json synthetic edges
Husky pre-commit gate green at commit time
notes: CLOSED at HEAD 7cb17f0. walkAncestors + walkAncestorsByLens + walk-ancestors pi tool + scripts/orchestrator/walk-ancestors.ts shipped. tsconfig.json gained @davidorex/pi-context/lens-view path mapping. Tests: pi-context 413 → 420 (+7). Closure-table runtime demo deferred to Phase 5 (per-test fixtures own synthetic relations.json). See VER-007.
